_exempt: <!-- PRIMARY-SOURCE-EXEMPT: reason=exact-integer witness of same-medium specificity for the self-pumped conjugator; different return screen (phi'=12 != phi=8) leaves residual qa_mod(-s+phi'-phi). -->
primary_source: (Zel'dovich, 1985) ISBN 978-3-540-13458-4 (self-pumped geometries); (Feinberg, 1982) DOI 10.1364/OL.7.000486. Different-medium return (phi'=12 != phi=8) leaves residual 23, not the clean conjugate.
